heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 79e Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated annually, from money in the Treasury of the United States not otherwise appropriated, such sums as are necessary for the administration of this subchapter and for the maintenance of laboratory or other facilities provided for carrying out the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1387 of Title 48
Amendments1983— struck out “, not to exceed $750,000” after “such sums”.Pub. L. 98–571979— substituted “$750,000” for “$350,000”.Pub. L. 96–891965— substituted “$350,000” for “$10,000”.Pub. L. 89–280

Effective Date of 1983 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–57, § 297 Stat. 293July 22, 1983“The provision in the first section of this Act [amending this section] shall take effect on .”October 1, 1983
